title: Vanilla Flavored 2.0
description: The second iteration of my Vanilla Flavored modpack. This time with more flavor than ever!
body:
# Vanilla Flavored Vanilla Flavored 2.0 is a modpack with a whole bunch of mods aimed at improving and adding to the vanilla feel and experience. This 2.0 release brings quite some quite substantial changes from the 1.0 version of the pack. It also deviates a bit more from the vanilla feel, mainly through the addition of the Ad Astra mod. This can however be ignored which will keep the vanilla feel a bit higher. ## Installation The modpack can easily be installed via any launcher supporting importing `.mrpack` files or where modpack search is integrated. I personally use the [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/). ## Recommended resource packs and shader packs I highly recommend installing [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations) together with [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions). For shaders I like to use [Complimentary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), which will have additional setting thanks to the [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) mod. The [Bare Bones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb) resource pack is also a personal favorite, As the mod pack has a lot of mods where the textures might align more with vanilla it is not as recommended as in earlier iterations. ## Server files I'm trying to upload a server-version of the pack where all the client-only mods have been removed. I don't know if this actually improves performance of the server in any way, but my experience is that it works ever-so-slightly better. Though that might just be imagined... Otherwise, you can just run a server using the mods folder and config folder from the pack itself. ## All mods Here is a list with all mods that are present in the pack. It will be filled out as I have time.
Thanks to all these mods!
